zh.lifeSummary: 當Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen於大約1490年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德米德爾可普時，她的父親Cornelis Jans van Aefferen36歲，母親Adriana Maria Broos32歲。她於1516年12月1日與Claas Willemsz van Deventer在荷蘭-拉藍德利爾達姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1532年9月20日享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen于大约1490年出生在荷兰-拉藍德米德爾可普时，她的父亲Cornelis Jans van Aefferen36岁，母亲Adriana Maria Broos32岁。她于1516年12月1日与Claas Willemsz van Deventer在荷兰-拉藍德利爾達姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1532年9月20日享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Margriet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.description: The Netherlands is inherited by the future Habsburg Emperor and King of Spain Charles V.
The Catholic King Charles I of Spain ruled the Netherlands.

en.lifeSummary: When Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen was born about 1490, in Middelkoop, South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Cornelis Jans van Aefferen, was 36 and her mother, Adriana Maria Broos, was 32. She married Claas Willemsz van Deventer on 1 December 1516, in Leerdam, South Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 September 1532, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen est née environ 1490, à Middelkoop, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Cornelis Jans van Aefferen, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adriana Maria Broos, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Claas Willemsz van Deventer le 1 décembre 1516, à Leerdam, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1532, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen um 1490 in Middelkoop, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cornelis Jans van Aefferen 36 und ihre Mutter Adriana Maria Broos 32. Sie hat am 1. Dezember 1516 in Leerdam, Südholland, Niederlande Claas Willemsz van Deventer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. September 1532 im Alter von 43 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen è nata il circa 1490 nel Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Cornelis Jans van Aefferen, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Adriana Maria Broos, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Claas Willemsz van Deventer il 1 dicembre 1516, nel Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1532, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferenが約1490年にオランダズイド-hオランドミッドエルコオップで生まれた時，父Cornelis Jans van Aefferenは36歳，母Adriana Maria Broosは32歳であった。1516年12月1日にオランダズイド-hオランドリールダムでClaas Willemsz van Deventerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1532年9月20日に43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen(이)가 대략 1490년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 미델코프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cornelis Jans van Aefferen(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adriana Maria Broos(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1516년 12월 1일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 리르다에서 Claas Willemsz van Deventer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1532년 9월 20일 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen nasceu aproximadamente 1490, em Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Cornelis Jans van Aefferen, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Adriana Maria Broos, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Claas Willemsz van Deventer em 1 de dezembro de 1516, em Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1532, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen родилась около 1490 г. в местности мидделкуп, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Cornelis Jans van Aefferen было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adriana Maria Broos, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Claas Willemsz van Deventer 1 декабря 1516 г. в местности лирдам, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 сентября 1532 г. в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen nació aproximadamente 1490, en Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Cornelis Jans van Aefferen, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Adriana Maria Broos, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Claas Willemsz van Deventer el 1 de diciembre de 1516, en Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1532, a la edad de 43 años.
